Treasure Trove

Every great civilization had a treasury. A sacred place where the most important objects on earth were kept. That place has a name now.

Brand Guidelines v1.0 · March 2026
Primary Typeface
Trove Super Condensed
Primary Color

Foundation · Logo

Primary Logo

The primary lockup pairs the icon with the wordmark in a single horizontal arrangement. This is the default form — use it whenever space and composition allow.

Color Variants

Dark Background

Default. On Obsidian or any dark surface.

PNG

Light Background

On Ash, Cloud, Pearl or any light surface.

PNG

Golden Yellow

Reserved — use with intention on dark backgrounds.

PNG
Foundation · Logo

Stacked Logo

The stacked lockup is vertical-friendly. Use only when the primary cannot fit the composition without compromising legibility. When in doubt, default to the primary.

Color Variants

Light Background

On Ash, Cloud, Pearl or any light surface.

PNG

Dark Background

On Obsidian or any dark surface.

PNG

Golden Yellow

Reserved — use with intention on dark backgrounds.

PNG
Foundation · Logo

Symbol

The standalone mark for contexts where the brand name is established — app icons, favicons, social avatars, compact placements. Never use smaller than 24px.

Color Variants

Light Background

On Ash, Cloud, Pearl or any light surface.

PNG

Dark Background

On Obsidian or any dark surface.

PNG

Golden Yellow

Reserved — use with intention.

PNG
Foundation · Logo

Safe Zone

To protect the logo from other visual elements, it must be surrounded by a minimum amount of clear space at all times. No graphic elements should encroach within this area.

Minimum Clear Space
½ X ½ X ½ X ½ X

The safe zone on all four sides equals ½ X, where X is the full width of the symbol icon. No typography, imagery, or graphic elements may enter this space.

Foundation · Logo

Logo Dont's

Our mark has been built with precision. Any distortion, alteration, or misuse weakens what it stands for. These are not stylistic preferences — they are the rules that protect the integrity of the brand.

Incorrect Usage
Do not distort

Never stretch, squash, or alter proportions in any way.

Do not add effects

No drop shadows, glows, outlines, gradients, or filters.

Do not alter colors

Only use approved color variants. Never recolor arbitrarily.

Do not use on patterns

Always place on a clean, solid-color background.

Do not resize the icon

The icon and wordmark must stay in their fixed proportional relationship.

Do not use on busy imagery

Ensure sufficient contrast and clear space at all times.

Foundation · Color

Color Palette

Color is used with restraint and intention. Each color exists for a reason — nothing is decorative. Click any swatch to copy the hex value.

Foundation · Typography

Typography

Each typeface has a defined role. Never substitute or mix outside these guidelines.

Typefaces
TROVE
SUPER
Trove Super Condensed
Display only · Uppercase only · Headlines
ANTON
Anton
Google ↗
Open source fallback · Slides & external docs
Regular — Body copy Medium — UI labels Semibold — Emphasis Bold — Subheadings
Aa
Archivo
